_comment: Surfpool launch configuration. `datasourceRpcUrl` is the ONLY remote RPC
URL permitted in this repository (allowlisted in scripts/check-rpc-lock.mjs).
It is used SOLELY by Surfpool to SOURCE mainnet fork data (copy-on-read
account fetches). No transaction is ever submitted to it: agents and the
Prereg §3 field 'Fonte RPC do fork' = this value.
